banknotes.reverse_info:
Sculpture "Lietuvos mokykla" or "Vargo mokykla" ("School of 
    Misery"; by Petras Rimša)
    Symbol of restistence against the prohibition of the Lithuanian press by the 
    Russian Tsar from 1864 to 1904. Books in Lithuanian language had to be read 
    secretly in the schools. Here a mother reads with her child whilst she is 
    spinning.
